SQUALL-REVOLVER.description: After 3 attacks, gain 2 [gold]Firepower[/gold]. At the start of combat, [gold]Junction[/gold] 1 Guardian Force (GF).
SQUALL-REVOLVER.title: Revolver
SQUALL-LIONHEART.description: Gain [gold]Lionheart[/gold] finisher. After 3 attacks, gain 5 [gold]Firepower[/gold]. At the start of combat, [gold]Junction[/gold] 1 Guardian Force (GF)
SQUALL-LIONHEART.title: Lionheart
SQUALL-LEVIATHAN_SCALE.description: You can now [gold[Junction[/gold] Leviathan at the start of combat.
SQUALL-LEVIATHAN_SCALE.title: Leviathan Scale
SQUALL-MAGIC_LAMP.description: Gain 5 [gold]Crisis[/gold] at the start of every turn. You can now [gold]Junction[/gold] Diabolos at the start of combat.
SQUALL-MAGIC_LAMP.title: Magic Lamp
SQUALL-SOLOMON_RING.description: Your [gold]Summoned[/gold] GFs and the Magic added by [gold]Draw[/gold] are [gold]Upgraded[/gold].
SQUALL-SOLOMON_RING.title: Solomon Ring
SQUALL-JUNCTION_RING.description: [gold]Junction[/gold] an additional GF at the start of combat.
SQUALL-JUNCTION_RING.title: Junction Ring
